name: sf-symbols-pipeline
description: Validate and generate assets for custom SF Symbols.

interface.longDescription: A platform-agnostic MCP toolchain for validating custom SF Symbols inputs, generating pipeline artifacts, and helping iOS/macOS teams prepare symbol assets with repeatable checks. This Codex Plugin wraps an independent MCP server rather than replacing it.
defaultPrompt: Audit this custom SF Symbol SVG.
Create an SF Symbols import checklist.
Generate Swift usage for this symbol.
